title: Commercial Property Management Truth Stack
summary: Commercial property management is the operational discipline of preserving asset value, servicing tenants, and translating building performance into owner outcomes.
starterPack: Start with PCA, RICS, and NABERS.
Read JLL, CBRE, and Knight Frank research.
Use owner reporting and building-performance sources.
